[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A close-up anime-style portrait shows a young person with light blue hair holding a white cup near their face.

The main subject is a face and upper body in an anime illustration: a person with large blue eyes, pale skin, and straight light blue hair with bangs, wearing a light-colored top with a blue collar detail. They hold a white cup with both hands close to the lower part of their mouth, with their fingers wrapped around the cup; their expression is neutral with a slightly open mouth and small dot-like marks on the cheek area.

The setting is unclear, but the background appears as a softly blurred indoor scene with muted colors, including a brownish area behind the character and some indistinct lighter shapes.

The lighting is even and soft, with subtle shading on the face and hair. The composition is tightly framed from around the shoulders upward, with the character’s eyes centered and looking forward toward the viewer; the cup occupies the lower center of the image.

No important visible text detected.

The image shows an anime-style character holding a cup close to their face. It is a close-up view with soft indoor-like background blur and a neutral expression.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
